claims.claim: In live experiments using Qwen2.5-7B (GGUF, local inference) against the llama.cpp repository, the amortized reduced planner matched or exceeded the answer quality of vanilla baselines using 190- and 260-token planner contexts while reducing all-in prompt-like token consumption by 18.9–58.2%, depending on the baseline and feedback budget.
